regions.grounding_phrase: the light blue tennis court surface
regions.rationale: Hard courts are commonly painted light blue or green; the pale surface here suggests light blue.

regions.grounding_phrase: the dark green windscreen panel at the back of the court
regions.rationale: Court windscreens are conventionally dark green.

regions.grounding_phrase: the red t-shirt of the boy holding the trophy
regions.rationale: Luminance under-determines shirt colour; a saturated red is chosen to test multi-instance binding (one red shirt among white ones).
Dense summer canopy; strongly constrained to green.
